---
title: "Visualisation of covidMRP data and results - model 1"
author: "Swen Kuh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
Visualising raw data proportion of outcome and MRP estimate for the small areas: 

```{r setup, echo=F, warning=F, message=F}
## Visualising raw covidMRP data
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(HDInterval)

# data 
source(here("code/data_list.R"))
data_list$strata = as.factor(data_list$strata)

# model 1 results 
m1_postpred <- readRDS(here("results/model files/m1_postpred.RDS"))

# making small area MRP estimates 
p_pop_post_m1 = m1_postpred$draws("p_pop", format="matrix") # stan output
n_sim = nrow(p_pop_post_m1)
n_postcode = data_list$n_postcode
N_pop1 = data_list$N_pop1
n_strata = data_list$n_strata
n_seifa = data_list$n_seifa
n_age = data_list$n_age

ypred_fit1_postcode <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_postcode))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_postcode){  
    ok <- data_list$postcode_pop==j
    ypred_fit1_postcode[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m1[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit1_postcode) =  levels(data_list$postcode) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_postcode <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_postcode, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_postcode) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                            "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "postcode")
MRP_postcode[,'postcode'] <- levels(data_list$postcode)
for (j in 1:n_postcode){
  MRP_postcode[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j])
  MRP_postcode[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_postcode[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_postcode[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_postcode[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_postcode[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_postcode[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_postcode[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_postcode[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_postcode[,j], probs=0.95)
}

# proportion of outcome - postcode (sum(n_j) > 1 ) ####
( g1 = tab |> 
    group_by(postcode) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    filter(sum_y > 0) |> 
    arrange(prop_y) |> 
    left_join(MRP_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    mutate(postcode = fct_reorder(postcode, desc(prop_y))) |> # arranging by estimate
    ggplot(aes(x=postcode)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by prop_y") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )

( g1b = tab |> 
    group_by(postcode) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    filter(sum_y > 0) |> 
    left_join(MRP_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    mutate(postcode = fct_reorder(postcode, desc(n))) |> # arranging by estimate
    ggplot(aes(x=postcode)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by sum(n_j)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )

# proportion of outcome - postcode (sum(n_j) == 1)
( g2 = tab |> 
    group_by(postcode) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    filter(sum_y == 0) |> 
    arrange(prop_y) |> 
    left_join(MRP_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    mutate(postcode = fct_reorder(postcode, desc(`MRP Estimate`))) |> # arranging by estimate
    ggplot(aes(x=postcode)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylim(0, 0.06) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6))  + 
    labs(title = "sum(y) == 0") )


# strata ------------------------------------------------------------------
a_strata = m1_postpred$summary("a_strata")[,c('variable','median')] |> 
  cbind(strata = levels(data_list$strata))

ypred_fit1_strata <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_strata))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_strata){  
    ok <- data_list$strata_pop==j
    ypred_fit1_strata[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m1[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit1_strata) =  levels(data_list$strata) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_strata <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_strata, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_strata) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                          "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "strata")
MRP_strata[,'strata'] <- levels(data_list$strata)
for (j in 1:n_strata){
  MRP_strata[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit1_strata[,j])
  MRP_strata[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_strata[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_strata[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_strata[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_strata[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_strata[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_strata[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_strata[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_strata[,j], probs=0.95)
}

# proportion of outcome - strata (n_y == 1 )
(g2 = tab |> 
    group_by(strata) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(MRP_strata, by="strata") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=strata)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="strata", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = "3052", linetype="dashed", col="grey")  )

# seifa ------------------------------------------------------------------
ypred_fit1_seifa <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_seifa))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_seifa){  
    ok <- data_list$seifa_pop==j
    ypred_fit1_seifa[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m1[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit1_seifa) =  levels(data_list$seifa) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_seifa <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_seifa, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_seifa) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                         "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "seifa")
MRP_seifa[,'seifa'] <- levels(data_list$seifa)
for (j in 1:n_seifa){
  MRP_seifa[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j])
  MRP_seifa[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_seifa[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_seifa[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_seifa[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_seifa[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_seifa[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_seifa[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_seifa[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_seifa[,j], probs=0.95)
}

# proportion of outcome - seifa (n_y == 1 )
(g3 = tab |> 
    group_by(seifa) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(MRP_seifa, by="seifa") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=seifa)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="seifa", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = "3052", linetype="dashed", col="grey")  )


# age ------------------------------------------------------------------
ypred_fit1_age <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_age))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_age){  
    ok <- data_list$agegp_pop==j
    ypred_fit1_age[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m1[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit1_age) =  levels(data_list$agegp) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_age <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_age, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_age) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                       "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "agegp")
MRP_age[,'agegp'] <- levels(data_list$agegp)
for (j in 1:n_age){
  MRP_age[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit1_age[,j])
  MRP_age[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_age[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_age[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_age[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_age[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_age[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_age[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit1_age[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_age[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_age[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_age[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_age[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_age[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_age[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_age[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit1_age[,j], probs=0.95)
}

# proportion of outcome - age 
(g_age = tab |> 
    group_by(agegp) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(MRP_age, by="agegp") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=agegp)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="age", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )

```
